description: Interactive Command Center inside the dashboard that surfaces every skill the harness exposes, gives the agent live dashboard state + DAG flow awareness, chains multi-step playbooks with dry-run, and enforces type-to-confirm on destructive actions.

userStories.title: Agent skills registry endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single source of truth the dashboard can query to list all executable skills and their metadata, so the UI doesn't hard-code skill names.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/agent/skills returns { skills: Skill[] } with id, name, category, description, argsSchema, destructive, requiresConfirmation, exampleInvocations
Registry populated from src/agent/skills-registry.ts (single source of truth)
Adding a skill requires only editing the registry file
Gateway endpoint covers trade/inspect/analyze/setup/safety categories
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/agent/skills-registry.ts (13 skills across 5 cats); endpoint at src/gateway/index.ts. Smoke test passes: '/api/agent/skills lists all skill definitions'.

userStories.title: Agent context feed endpoint
userStories.description: As the agent, I need to know what the user is currently looking at (mode, risk, positions, scraper health, recent runs) so suggestions reference real state.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/agent/context returns modeLock, tradingHalted, risk, positions, scraperHealth, rails, recentRuns, skills, aiProviders
Gateway exposes endpoint with full harness snapshot
Dashboard polls via useAgentContext hook (8s cadence)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Endpoint in src/gateway/index.ts; hook at packages/dashboard/src/hooks/useAgentContext.ts. Smoke test passes: '/api/agent/context returns full harness snapshot'. Live verification returned mode=paper-only, 6 scrapers, 13 skills, 7 recent runs.

userStories.title: Command palette (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a global command palette to trigger any skill or jump to any view without hunting through menus.
acceptanceCriteria: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K opens centered searchable overlay
Fuzzy matches skill names, intent phrases, view names
Enter executes; Arrow keys navigate; Esc closes
New file: packages/dashboard/src/components/CommandPalette.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: CommandPalette.tsx shipped; bundle confirms testids 'command-palette' and 'palette-trigger'.

userStories.title: Skills panel (dedicated route)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated view showing every skill as a rich card so I can see what's possible, read examples, and launch from one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Nav entry Skills routes to #skills view
Category tabs (Trade / Inspect / Analyze / Setup / Safety)
Each card shows: name, description, args form, destructive badge, Run button
Destructive skills show red border and require type-to-confirm
New file: packages/dashboard/src/pages/SkillsPage.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Skill invocation endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a unified gateway endpoint that routes skill invocations through the existing intent router.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/agent/skills/:id/invoke returns { runId, status, output, durationMs }
Destructive skills return { status: 'blocked', reason: 'confirmation_required' } unless confirmed: true
Every invocation writes to in-memory run log (last 200) at GET /api/agent/runs
Errors return { status: 'failed' } — never 500
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Endpoint in src/gateway/index.ts; runs-log.ts is the ring buffer. Smoke test passes 3 invocation-related tests (safe invoke, destructive block, destructive confirm). All handle the destructive double-call gate.

userStories.title: Floating Agent Console
userStories.description: As a user, I want a persistent console showing the agent's current recommendation, recent runs, and a one-click apply button.
acceptanceCriteria: Collapsed: 48px circular button bottom-right with status dot
Expanded: 360px panel with current status, latest suggestion, 3 recent runs, Apply button
Apply routes through the skill invocation endpoint
New file: packages/dashboard/src/components/AgentConsole.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Agent flow visualizer (DAG)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a live graph showing how data moves through the harness — scrapers → strategies → risk → execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders nodes grouped by category (setup, inspect, trade, safety)
SVG bezier edges; pulse animation on recent runs
Click node to see tooltip with skill details
New file: packages/dashboard/src/components/FlowVisualizer.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: FlowVisualizer.tsx shipped — category-column DAG with pulse animation on recent runs. Bundle testids 'flow-visualizer', 'flow-node-', 'flow-tooltip' confirmed.

userStories.title: Type-to-confirm gate for destructive skills
userStories.description: As a user, I want a deliberate type-to-confirm step on panic, sell, close, and reduce so I never flatten my book by accident.
acceptanceCriteria: Modal dialog shown before destructive invocations
User must type literal confirm word (PANIC, CLOSE, REDUCE) — case-sensitive
Confirm button disabled until typed string matches
Escape or clicking outside cancels
Successful confirm attaches confirmed: true to POST
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ConfirmDestructive modal shipped; bundle testid 'confirm-modal' present. Backend gate verified via smoke test: panic blocks without confirmed, executes with confirmed.

userStories.title: Chained execution playbooks
userStories.description: As a user, I want to queue a multi-step playbook and have the agent execute it one step at a time with previews.
acceptanceCriteria: Chain button opens builder; add 2–6 skill invocations in order
Each step previews args with {previous.output} template tokens
Dry run shows what each step would invoke without executing
Run executes sequentially, aborting on first failure
Destructive steps require per-step confirmation
POST /api/agent/chains/run returns chainId; WS events chain:start, chain:step:start, chain:step, chain:complete
New file: packages/dashboard/src/components/ChainBuilder.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ChainBuilder.tsx + POST /api/agent/chains/run shipped. Smoke test covers 4 chain scenarios: dry-run returns dry-run per step, safe chain runs sequentially, destructive step blocks mid-chain, runs tagged with chainId in audit log.

userStories.title: Audit log panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want an always-visible audit trail of every skill invocation.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log in RightSidebar (or its own section) showing last N runs
Each row: timestamp, skill id, args summary, status badge, duration
Click to expand full args + output
Data source: /api/agent/runs + WS run events
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: RunsAuditPanel rendered in RightSidebar. Bundle testid 'audit-panel' confirmed. Chain runs tagged with chainId.

userStories.title: Agent-initiated skill suggestions
userStories.description: As a user, I want the agent to proactively surface skill suggestions based on state.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/agent/suggest returns ranked suggestions with priority high/normal/low
Each suggestion exposes skillId + prefilled args and a reason
Suggestions never fire during panic cooldown or for blocked skills
Rule-based engine lives in src/agent/suggestions.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Endpoint live. Verified live: returns 3 ranked suggestions including high-priority 'onboard' when AI not configured. Smoke test covers '/api/agent/suggest returns prioritized suggestions'.

userStories.title: Dashboard context → agent system prompt
userStories.description: As the agent reasoning over commands, I need dashboard state injected into my system prompt so answers reference what the user sees.
acceptanceCriteria: buildContext() in src/ai/index.ts prepends [Current Dashboard Context] block
Block includes mode, halt state, equity, daily P&L, open positions, rails, last 5 skill runs
Context kept under 600 tokens
OPENTRADEX_DISABLE_CONTEXT_INJECT=1 disables it
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: buildContext() enhanced to include isTradingHalted, getEquity, getRuns(5), and enabled rails. Env-var kill switch respected. Backend typecheck clean.

userStories.title: Keyboard shortcuts for top skills
userStories.description: As a power user, I want one-keystroke shortcuts to trigger common skills.
acceptanceCriteria: g then s → Skills page; g then m → Markets; g then t → Trades
g then r → risk snapshot; g then p → positions check
c → open Chain Builder
! → opens panic confirmation
/ → focuses chat input
? → opens shortcut help overlay
Shortcuts disabled when focus is inside input/textarea
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Bigram detection with 1s timeout; input/textarea guard in App.tsx. ShortcutsHelp.tsx modal lists all bindings. Bundle testids 'shortcuts-help', 'shortcuts-close', 'help-trigger' confirmed.

userStories.title: Skills live status badges in TopBar
userStories.description: As a user, I want small status badges showing at-a-glance harness state.
acceptanceCriteria: Scraper rollup badge (red/yellow/green/grey)
Halt badge appears when trading is halted
Active runs badge shows count during recent activity
AI-ready warning badge if no provider configured
Click opens detail panel
New file: packages/dashboard/src/components/HarnessStatusBadges.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: HarnessStatusBadges.tsx shipped and wired to TopBar. Bundle testids 'harness-status', 'scraper-badge', 'active-runs-badge' confirmed.

userStories.title: E2E smoke test — complete command-center flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an E2E test that exercises the full Command Center flow so regressions are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file: packages/dashboard/smoke-test.mjs
Covers: health, context, suggest, skills list, safe invoke, destructive block, destructive confirm, runs log, HTML served, bundle testid coverage
Covers chains: dry-run, sequential execution, destructive abort, audit log tagging
All tests pass against live gateway
userStories.notes: 14/14 smoke tests passing against live gateway on :3210. Runs via `node packages/dashboard/smoke-test.mjs`.

userStories.title: Documentation for skill authors
userStories.description: As a developer adding a new skill, I need a short guide so I know how the skill surfaces in the Command Center.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: docs/adding-a-skill.md
Covers registry shape, destructive vs non-destructive flags, args schema, command template contract
Includes worked example and verification steps
Lists every surface a skill automatically appears on
userStories.notes: docs/adding-a-skill.md shipped with 3-step walkthrough, category semantics table, design rules, and surface matrix.
